pi_items.source: setup_task.sh observing plan text and verifier.py checking for 'M44', 'Praesepe', or 'NGC 2632'
setup_task.sh observing plan RA 08h 40m 24s corresponds to 8.6733 hours, and verifier.py strictly enforces M44_RA = 8.6733
setup_task.sh observing plan Dec +19° 40' 00" corresponds to 19.667 degrees, and verifier.py strictly enforces M44_DEC = 19.667
setup_task.sh observing plan requires B-band and V-band, and verifier.py strictly expects these directories and mentions them
setup_task.sh observing plan explicitly requires B-band in Filter wheel slot 3
setup_task.sh observing plan explicitly requires V-band in Filter wheel slot 2
setup_task.sh observing plan explicitly requires exposure time of 20 seconds for B-band
setup_task.sh observing plan explicitly requires exposure time of 15 seconds for V-band
setup_task.sh observing plan requires minimum 8 frames per filter, and verifier.py uses this target
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh both use this base directory for checking subdirectories B and V
setup_task.sh explicit instructions, and export_result.sh checks this exact path
setup_task.sh explicit instructions, and export_result.sh checks this exact path
setup_task.sh explicitly writes to this path
verifier.py docstring exactly matches this occupation string
Task context describing thesis proposal, observing plan PI 'Stellar Populations Group', completely consistent with the claim

privileged_info_summary: The task operates in a simulated environment utilizing synthetic FITS imagery from the KStars/INDI CCD simulator. It has been verified that the expected target coordinates are strictly RA 8.6733h and Dec 19.667 degrees (M44 / Praesepe), with a required 30 arcmin tolerance. The correct filter configurations explicitly enforce B-band at slot 3 with a 20s exposure and V-band at slot 2 with a 15s exposure, with a minimum of 8 FITS files per filter to be saved into subdirectories of '/home/ga/Images/m44_cmd'. The correct report and sky view paths correspond exactly to the explicit requirements in the setup instructions and verifier logic.
